{{CargoRelic
|name=Dimensional Wanted Order S-6
|class_id=20867
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=The Demon God's apostles occupy space-time gaps, Earth's will issues this wanted order to encourage travelers to go all out to eliminate the apostles! -- Earth's Will (Seal)
|fame=16
|art=14
|fth=15
|civ=15
|tech=30
|ss1=Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +1<br>Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +1<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:40/40
|ss2=Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +2<br>Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +2<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:40/40
|ss3=Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:40/40
|ss4=Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:40/40
|ss7=Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail DEF +3<br>Per 1 Time II Apostles dominated, Snail RUSH +3<br>Time Rift II Apostles dominated:40/40<br> (Awakened)
}}
